# Daemon Workflow Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/workflowevidence -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

- workflow count: `101`
- evidence covered: `98`
- workflow statuses: `covered=98`, `metadata_only=3`
- evidence tools covered: `65/65`
- evidence tools bound to artifacts: `65/65`
- accepted gaps: `0`
- non-strict artifact uploads: `0`
- missing evidence uploads: `0`
- unregistered gaps: `0`

## Evidence Loop

| Step | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Observe | Daemon has many public GitHub Actions workflows, but command-only checks can pass or fail without a durable JSON evidence artifact, making loop-engineering claims weaker than control-plane workflow evidence. |
| Hypothesis | A daemon workflow evidence manifest can classify every executable workflow, fail on non-strict uploads or missing evidence-out bindings, and keep accepted gaps at zero once legacy command-only workflows are bound to evidence tools. |
| Execute | Scan .yml and .yaml GitHub Actions workflows, classify evidence coverage, require fail-closed artifact uploads, require every evidence-out path to be uploaded, compare evidence-out capable tools with workflow invocations, and render a generated workflow evidence reader. |
| Evaluate | The verifier fails on unregistered executable workflows, non-strict artifact uploads, missing evidence uploads, evidence-capable tools without workflow coverage, stale generated docs, unused accepted gaps, or workflow extension drift. |
| Retrospective | Daemon workflow observability is now an executable migration surface: covered evidence workflows stay green, broad CI emits compact evidence, and future workflow drift cannot remain silent. |

## Assertions

- workflows with executable checks must either publish evidence artifacts or be registered as accepted gaps
- artifact uploads must fail closed with if-no-files-found:error
- each evidence-out path must be uploaded by a strict artifact step
- workflow evidence must expose status distribution as top-level evidence
- every evidence-out capable tool must be invoked by at least one workflow
- every evidence-out capable tool must have an evidence-out invocation bound to an uploaded artifact
- workflow inventory must include both .yml and .yaml GitHub Actions files
- accepted gaps are debt, not completion
- daemon executable workflow evidence must converge to zero accepted gaps
